channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Collected all the flytip together, 29th March
item.description:
Please collect

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glassmill Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Signs not Facing Road Correctly, 29th March
item.description:
Road signs mounted on lamp post are twisted, not facing the road, lamp post is outside 23 Downs Hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downs Hill, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallets & house hold items dumped, 29th March
item.description:
Wood pallets & several household items dumped, & appears to be added to daily, near the electric sub station in Glendown Road SE2

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glendown Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous paving, litter, 29th March
item.description:
The surface of the footpath, particularly at the Hayes lane end it’s damaged and treacherous. There is a great deal of litter including broken glass in the footpath. There is no evidence of the footpath being regularly checked or swept.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned & damaged, 29th March
item.description:
Needs collection

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2A, Rectory Grove, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip next to 20 Passey place, 29th March
item.description:
Matresa, chairs, household waste, black bags, loose waste, litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Passey Place, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 29th March
item.description:
Tenants left house 16 and dumped their rubbish on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Mill Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cat, 29th March
item.description:
Grey cat

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westmoreland Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the wall of the Surrey Docks Water Sports Centre, 29th March
item.description:
Graffiti on the east facing sound barrier of the water sports centre between the building itself and Swedish Quays. The person who did the graffiti is shown in the second picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rope Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 29th March
item.description:
Dead fox on road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Andrew's Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish in front No. 41, 29th March
item.description:
People have started to leave rubbish in front of no. 41. Problem for a few weeks now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wetherell Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole outside by drive way which is getting deeper and wider., 29th March
item.description:
Pot holes has now been here for several weeks and could be a problem for pedestrians and car users.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clay Wood Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping cardboard, 29th March
item.description:
Cardboard fly tipping next to car park, has addresses on them (N1), has been there since Saturday (likely chucked out of the car)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garbage on road for many days, 29th March
item.description:
Will anyone clean this up please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larkhall Rise, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bag left, 29th March
item.description:
A full black bin bag has been left on the pavement outside the bin store. It has been there over a week. I have watched street sweeper clean around it.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 29th March
item.description:
And litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meeson Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Square at junction of Tennyson road and priory park road, 29th March
item.description:
See pic. Assorted bags and carpet and boxes dumped by different people around the square. Put together at edge of road for collection

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Multiple vans parked on double yellow lines all used to carry out disruptive and unacceptable mechanics work on a regular basis., 29th March
item.description:
For over a year now there are individuals parking up to 7 vans, some of which are parked on double yellow lines, to carry out mechanical works on these vans and other vehicles. There are screws in the road and other debris and they block the pavement. It is causing a nuisance and is an environmental issue. The vans are there every day but there are many more at weekends and looks like they are running a mechanic business in the roadside. Please can they be moved on as it is unacceptable and I am sure illegal to be doing this.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Floathaven Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden furniture dumped in River, 29th March
item.description:
There are two bulky garden furniture items dumped in the river shuttle, specifically the overflow drain that leads onto the river

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Bridgen Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 12 inch pothole on Holmdene Rd at junction with Herne Hill, 29th March
item.description:
Pothole is deep and fills with rainwater.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Holmdene Avenue, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
